mobile.title: Search by keyword or paste a marketplace link
mobile.description: Use keyword search for discovery or paste a Taobao, 1688, Tmall, or Weidian link to jump straight into a purchase flow.
mobile.emptyDescription: Try a broader keyword, switch platform, or paste a direct item URL.

hero.title: Browse our stocked catalog, then let CNSnap buy and ship it.
hero.description: Explore your published storefront products, search by keyword, or paste a product link for direct item details and checkout.

trustNotes.reviewText: We check order details before purchase.
trustNotes.photosText: QC photos are reserved after arrival.
trustNotes.shipText: International freight is paid after weighing.

filters.title: Filters
filters.note: This catalog shows your published storefront products. Paste a direct product link in the search box if you want to open a specific marketplace item.

toolbar.description: Showing {count} listings from your published product library. Product price is shown before international freight; final shipping is calculated after warehouse weighing.

empty.title: No matching products found
empty.description: Try a broader keyword, remove price filters, or paste the original product link if you already have one.

error.title: Search is temporarily unavailable
error.description: We couldn't load the current search results right now. Please retry in a moment or go back to the homepage.
error.note: Your current keyword and filters are preserved when you retry.

risk.title: Search needs review
risk.description: This keyword may contain restricted or sensitive terms. CNSnap cannot show product suggestions for it.
risk.mobileNote: Paste a direct product link instead if you already know the item and want to continue with manual review.

panel.keywordPlaceholder: Search products by keyword or item ID

riskReminder.title: Risk Reminder
riskReminder.subtitle: This item may involve {count} restricted {label}. Please choose another item or contact support for help.
riskReminder.alertDescription: The submitted product may fall under restricted or legally sensitive categories, so we cannot process this purchasing request at the moment.
riskReminder.noResultTitle: We cannot show products for this search. Try a different keyword or contact customer service for help.

suggestions.one: 1. Check whether the keyword contains restricted or sensitive terms.
suggestions.two: 2. Rephrase your search with broader words, such as “dress” instead of a very specific restricted phrase.
suggestions.three: 3. Review shipping and mail restrictions before submitting products.
suggestions.four: 4. If you have a normal product link, submit it directly from the homepage search box.
suggestions.five: 5. Contact support if you need help finding a compliant alternative.
